name: Impossible Chicken Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Frozen Corn, Thaw and Drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Mix together the cooked chicken, corn, and taco seasoning in a bowl.
4. Add chopped green chilies (make sure they are drained) to the mixture.
5. Pour the mix into the prepared pie plate.
6. Sprinkle with cheese.
7. In a separate bowl, beat the remaining ingredients until smooth. This can be done using a blender for 15 seconds on high or a hand beater for 1 minute.
8. Pour the batter over the chicken mixture in the pie plate.
9. Bake at 400°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
10. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving with sour cream and shredded lettuce.
